narrative:
Precinct Portsmouth 1-C (precinct in Scioto County) has 682 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.9 percentage points.
